Package com.irurueta.units

Class DistanceConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.DistanceConverter
  • public class DistanceConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does distance conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying distance measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_CENTIMETER
      Number of meters in 1 centimeter.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_FOOT
      Number of meters in 1 foot.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_INCH
      Number of meters in 1 inch.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_KILOMETER
      Number of meters in 1 kilometer.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_MILE
      Number of meters in 1 mile.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_MILLIMETER
      Number of meters in 1 millimeter.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_YARD
      Number of meters in 1 yard.

      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double centimeterToMeter​(double centimeter)
      Converts provided centimeter value to meters.
      static double convert​(double input, DistanceUnit inputUnit, DistanceUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void convert​(Distance input, Distance output)
      Converts a distance to provided output distance unit.

      Converts and updates a distance to requested output unit.

      Converts a distance to requested output unit.

      Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.

      Converts a distance to requested output unit.

      Converts provided foot value to meters.

    • Constructor Detail

        private DistanceConverter()
        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Distance input,
                           Distance output)
        Converts a distance to provided output distance unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input distance to be converted.
        output - output distance where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Distance convertAndReturnNew​(Distance input,
                                           DistanceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a distance to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input distance to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted distance.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Distance distance,
                           DistanceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a distance to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        distance - input distance to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Distance input,
                           DistanceUnit outputUnit,
                           Distance result)
        Converts a distance to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input distance to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - distance instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       DistanceUnit inputUnit,
                                       DistanceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - distance value.
        inputUnit - input distance unit.
        outputUnit - output distance unit.
        Returns:
        converted distance value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             DistanceUnit inputUnit,
                             DistanceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - distance value.
        inputUnit - input distance unit.
        outputUnit - output distance unit.
        Returns:
        converted distance value.

      • meterToMillimeter

        public static double meterToMillimeter​(double meter)
        Converts provided meter value to millimeters.
        Parameters:
        meter - meter value.
        Returns:
        same distance converted to millimeters.

      • millimeterToMeter

        public static double millimeterToMeter​(double millimeter)
        Converts provided milimeter value to meters.
        Parameters:
        millimeter - milimeter value.
        Returns:
        same distance converted to meters.
